app_service_environment_id.description: The ID of the App Service Environment to use for the service plan. Optional.

name.description: The name of the App Service Plan.

os_type.description: The operating system type for the service plan, such as 'Windows' or 'Linux'.

per_site_scaling_enabled.description: Indicates if each site can be scaled independently within the plan. Optional.

sku_name.description: The pricing tier for the service plan, like 'F1', 'B1', 'S1', etc.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource. Optional.

zone_balancing_enabled.description: Determines if the service plan should be zone balanced. Optional.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
